description: Alphabet Inc is the parent company of Google, YouTube, Google Cloud, DeepMind, and Waymo. It is the dominant global search engine and online advertising platform.
known_facts: Google Search holds over 90% global market share in search
Sundar Pichai is CEO of both Alphabet and Google
YouTube is the second-largest search engine and largest video platform
Google Cloud is the third-largest cloud provider with over $30 billion annual revenue
DeepMind and Google Brain merged into Google DeepMind in 2023
Waymo operates commercial autonomous robotaxi services in multiple US cities
Google advertising revenue including Search and YouTube exceeds $200 billion annually
Gemini is Google's flagship large language model series
known_risks: DOJ antitrust lawsuit ruling that Google illegally monopolized search
AI-generated search threatening traditional search advertising model
Competition from Microsoft Bing with Copilot AI integration
YouTube content moderation and creator disputes
EU Digital Markets Act compliance costs and potential breakup remedies
Gemini AI model controversies and accuracy issues
known_strengths: Google Search generates enormous cash flow from dominant market position
YouTube advertising and subscription revenue growing strongly
Google Cloud accelerating with AI workloads and enterprise adoption
DeepMind and Google Brain leading AI research capabilities
Waymo self-driving technology leadership in the autonomous vehicle sector
Android ecosystem spanning billions of devices globally
